san Francisco, CA 94102
Re: Your Request for fnforlfla] Assistance
our File No. I-9 o-7 4 8
Dear Mr. Taylor:
By letter dated December 11, 1990 you have requested advice
under Lhe conf I ict-of-interest 
provisions of the Political 
Reform
Act (the rraslrt1.1 we are unable to provide you with the advice
you seek.
Your letter indicates that you have been directed by the
board to inquire why three supervisors - Ms. Alioto, Mr' Ha11inan,
and Mr. uon{isto - icould not voterr on a proposed condominium
conversion ordinance (126-90-1) at the board's December 10, 1990
neeting. No indication is provided to suggest that the inquiry is
being iade with the authorization, and therefore in a
repr6sentative capaci.ty on behalf, of the three supervisors'
The commission is authorized by statute to provide advice to
persons with questions about their responsibi l ities under the Act.
ive do not provid" advice to third parties about another person's
a"ti"= or ^outigati.ons unl,ess the third party has been authorized
io-i"q".rt 
advice by the person whose duties or obligations are in
question. (Section 83114,' Regulation LA329, copy enclosed') For
€his rea=on, we cannot provide you with the advice you have
requested . 2
1 Go.r".rr."nt Code Sections 81OOO-91015. A11 statutory references
are to trre Government code unless otherwise indicated. conmission
retufations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section
18ooo, et seq. A11 references to regulations are to Title 2,
oivision 6 of the California code of Regulations'
2 
Fo. your infornation, the commission has received telephone
inquiries fron the city attorney,s office on matters similar or
ieiatea to this issue on behalf of supervisors Alioto and
Hal-Iinan. Supervisor Hongisto, and the city attorney on his
behaff, have also contacted us'
428 J Street, Suite 8O0 . P.O. Box 8O7 o Sacramento cA 95804-0807 . (916)322'5660


File No. T-9o-7 4a
Page 2
Additionally, if the Board's direction somehow constitutes
official 
authorization on behalf of the three supervisors named in
your letter, we are stil1 unable to more fu11y respond to your
inquiry. 
The letter contains insufficient facts to pernit a
conflict of interest determination. (Regulation 18329(b) (2) (B)
and (b) (8) (c). )
I am sorry that we cannot provide you with the assistance you
requested. If you have any further questions regarding this
natter, please contact ne at (916) 322-5901.
s incere ly ,
Scott HaIlabrin
Acting
